description.short: Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
